VIDEO FRAME · 00:42 / 03:18
⬤ REC FLAGGED REGION
00:42
Detector signals
6 detectors · ensemble v4.2

Per-detector likelihood that the media has been synthetically generated or altered.

Facial landmark consistency0.96 manipulated
Temporal frame coherence0.93 manipulated
Lip-sync / audio correlation0.91 manipulated
GAN fingerprint detector0.61 elevated
Compression artifact map0.18 nominal
C2PA provenance checkabsent
Assessment
{{ selected.label }}
confidence{{ selected.conf }}%

High agreement across facial, temporal and audio detectors; no C2PA provenance manifest present. Under RIA art. 50(4) the content qualifies as an unlabelled AI manipulation. Recommended for agent confirmation.

assigned · {{ selected.analyst }}

New analysis

Submit media for assessment of AI manipulation under RIA art. 50(4). The engine auto-detects the content type, runs multimodal detection and produces a motivated report for the administrative file.

Drag media here, or browse files
Single file up to 2 GB · scanned for malware on upload
ImageJPEG · GIF · TIFF · WebP · HEIC
VideoMP4 · AVI · MKV · MOV · WMV · WebM · MXF · TS · ASF
AudioMP3 · WAV · AAC · FLAC · OGG
eu_summit_address.mp4
214.8 MB · H.264 / AAC · 1920×1080 · 00:03:18
Malware scan clear
Auto-detected classification engine · adjustable
Modality
Video Image Audio
Content subtype
Face — one or more persons Place / scene Monument Static image
Manipulation hypothesis
Modification of authentic Full AI generation
Audio track
With visual support Audio-only · short
Detection settings
Detection model
Multimodal ensemble. Audio detectors trained on Luxembourgish-language data.
Ensemble v4.2 · multimodal
Generate motivated report
Attaches the written justification required for the administrative decision (explainability layer, via API).
Deep malware scan
Sandbox-inspect the upload before processing. Recommended for tip-line and external sources.
Priority
High-priority files are surfaced in the decision queue.
Standard High
Results are scored on a probability band (high / medium / low). A reliability target of ≤ 15% false-negatives applies to the underlying models.

Auto-flag low confidence

Evidence notes
CW
Facial and temporal detectors agree at >0.93. No C2PA manifest present on the source upload. Recommending escalation to manipulated.
Camille Weber · 20 Jun · 10:18
MD
Cross-checked the broadcast original from RTL Télé — timestamps diverge by 1.2s. Added the clip as a linked analysis.
Marc Dubois · 20 Jun · 09:41
